---
description: "One-sentence reader-facing promise."
---

# Exact title [F] {#sec-chNN}

## What you need going in

> **Assumed:** neural-network fundamentals, backpropagation, basic Python, and beginner PyTorch.
>
> **From earlier chapters:** [Chapter N, Section name](NN-file.qmd#sec-example) — one-sentence recap of the exact dependency.
>
> **Not required:** name plausible but unnecessary prerequisites.

::: {.route-b}
**Route B backfill.** Include only for audited chapters. Name the exact source section, page-scale effort, and the consequence of skipping it.
:::

## Contents

- [Opening section](#sec-chNN-opening)
- [Teaching section](#sec-chNN-mechanism)
- [Build](#sec-chNN-build)
- [What endures, what changes](#sec-chNN-endures)
- [Exercises](#sec-chNN-exercises)

## Opening section {#sec-chNN-opening}

Begin with one failure, measurement, or practical goal. Explain enough context for the reader to care without opening with terminology.

## What you will build

::: {.callout-tip}
### The chapter artifact

Name one integrated build, its deterministic default fixture, optional real adapter, outputs, metrics, and success condition.
:::

## Teaching section {#sec-chNN-mechanism}

State why the mechanism matters and what the reader will be able to do. Give intuition before math. Define every symbol. Introduce no more than 40 new or changed code lines at once.

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-chNN-question
%%| fig-cap: "A caption phrased around the one question this figure answers."
flowchart LR
    A[Input] --> B[Mechanism] --> C[Observable result]
```

State the conclusion the reader should retain from the figure.

::: {.artifact-checkpoint}
| Artifact state | New code | Invariant now verified |
|---|---:|---|
| `artifact.py` after this section | 24 lines | State the executable property. |
:::

## Build {#sec-chNN-build}

Specify inputs, runnable steps, measurements, expected qualitative result, and an honesty note. Do not introduce an unrelated second artifact here.

## What endures, what changes {#sec-chNN-endures}

**What endures.** State the durable mechanisms and decision rules.

**What changes.** State the models, prices, versions, benchmark status, and product surfaces that require Appendix C verification.

## Exercises {#sec-chNN-exercises}

1. Confirm one mechanism by hand.
2. Change one parameter and predict before running.
3. Break one invariant and diagnose the trace.
4. Extend the reference artifact without replacing it.
5. Compare one alternative through measurement.
6. Defend a design choice and name its residual risk.

## Notes and sources

Use primary papers, specifications, official repositories, and official documentation. Keep dated details in a Landscape 2026 block registered in Appendix C.
